mods.name: Allwinner A64 Custom
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Device compatibility hooks for Allwinner A64 chip devices (Ococci tablets, smart screens)

mods.name: Echo Show Support
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Device compatibility hooks for Amazon Echo Show models (brightness, BLE, overlay, screensaver dark-off)

mods.name: WiFi & ADB Keep-Alive
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Keep WiFi and ADB debugging alive across crashes and reboots. Root preferred, Shizuku fallback.

mods.name: Flashlight
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Control device flashlight from Home Assistant

mods.name: HA Edge TTS
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Edge TTS for Home Assistant via Wyoming protocol.
mods.detail_description: Cloud-based TTS using Microsoft Edge TTS voices. 400+ voices in 40+ languages. Wyoming TCP port 10301.

mods.name: HA STT Engine
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Wyoming offline STT for Home Assistant (multilingual).
mods.detail_description: SenseVoice model: zh/en/ja/ko/Cantonese. ~230MB download. Wyoming TCP port 10300.

mods.name: BLE ADV Proxy
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Bidirectional raw BLE advertising proxy for ha-ble-adv. Scan nearby BLE broadcasts and send control packets to ceiling fans or lamps.
mods.detail_description: esphome-ble_adv_proxy port for ha-ble-adv. Requires Ava Bluetooth detect or ESPHome BT proxy scan. Exposes ble_adv_proxy_name for ha-ble-adv adapter discovery.

mods.name: DLNA Renderer
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Turn Ava into a LAN DLNA speaker for UPnP music.
mods.detail_description: BubbleUPnP supported; optional Cinema UI and voice ducking.

mods.name: GPS Location
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Expose device GPS location to Home Assistant

mods.name: OpenClaw(Mini)
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Java-built Android AI assistant for control, automation, screenshots, diagnostics, and expandable skills.

mods.name: Qcom Audio
mods.author: pantherale0
mods.description: Fix Qualcomm audio concurrency for voice assistant (ThinkSmart View)

mods.name: Phicomm R1
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Phicomm R1 native LED ring, voice-reactive, music RGB.
mods.detail_description: Stock msgcenter voice and dormant lights; optional 4-mic directional wake; RGB music ring.

mods.name: Facebook Portal
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Facebook Portal ambient sensors, presence detection, sound level, screen timeout, and alert tones

mods.name: Tuya S8E
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Control both Tuya S8E backlights and read onboard temperature and humidity values

mods.name: IR Blaster (ESPhome)
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: IR emitter and expose it to Home Assistant as a native ESPHome infrared transmitter.
mods.detail_description: Consumer IR + USB detection, Default TCP port 6054.

mods.name: YX LED Controller
mods.author: slovebj
mods.description: LED and motion sensor for YX M5612

mods.name: Screen Color Filter
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Apply a global screen color tint controllable from Home Assistant
mods.detail_description: Full-screen translucent overlay above all Ava layers. Select off, red, blue, dark, yellow, green, or gray from Home Assistant.

mods.name: Zigbee Gateway
mods.author: Ava
mods.description: Serial to TCP bridge for Zigbee coordinators
